title: Trace forward and back
description: A project owner or AI tool traces from any document forward to its descendants or back to its ancestors, walking only the intent chain.
iWant: to trace from any document forward to its descendants and back to its ancestors
soThat: I can follow an agreed decision down to the work that satisfies it, or a piece of work up to the decision it serves

acceptanceCriteria.description: Trace forward from a requirement returns the user stories, acceptance criteria and any test suites beneath it
acceptanceCriteria.then: it returns the user stories, acceptance criteria and any test suites beneath it

acceptanceCriteria.description: Trace back from an acceptance criterion returns the parent user story, its requirement and the PRD
acceptanceCriteria.then: it returns the parent user story, its requirement and the PRD

acceptanceCriteria.description: Trace walks the intent chain only, never the FBS layer
acceptanceCriteria.then: it walks the intent chain (PRD to REQ to US to AC to TS to TC) and does not traverse the FBS layer
